prompt_text:
### Demographics: 79-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Alzheimer's Disease
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 86.2 kg; Height 184.2 cm; BMI 25.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 130/90 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.8%; 9 months ago 7.3%; 6 months ago 6.8%; 3 months ago 6.3%; current 5.7%), FPG (12 months ago 178mg/dL; 9 months ago 147mg/dL; 6 months ago 159mg/dL; 3 months ago 150mg/dL; current 107mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 87.8kg; 9 months ago 85.7kg; 6 months ago 86.7kg; 3 months ago 85.3kg; current 86.2kg), Height (12 months ago 184.2cm; 9 months ago 184.2cm; 6 months ago 184.2cm; 3 months ago 184.2cm; current 184.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 128mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 130mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 88mmHg; 6 months ago 87mmHg; 3 months ago 87mmHg; current 90mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 26U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 21U/L), AST (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 20U/L; current 20U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; current 52mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 163mg/g; 9 months ago 149mg/g; 6 months ago 190mg/g; 3 months ago 191mg/g; current 160mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 70mg/dL; 9 months ago 72mg/dL; 6 months ago 69mg/dL; 3 months ago 72mg/dL; current 73mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 41mg/dL; 3 months ago 45mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 126mg/dL; 9 months ago 109mg/dL; 6 months ago 112mg/dL; 3 months ago 109mg/dL; current 118mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 12.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
